\tzpentry{ID3501}{Concept Clusters Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3501 introduces Concept Clusters Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ T^{\mu\nu} \;=\; T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm matter} \;+\; T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm EM} \;+\; T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm constraints/elastic}\,. \]
